steps.explanation: The function f(t) = 14t + 9 is in slope-intercept form. The coefficient of t is 14 (the growth rate), and 9 is the constant term — the y-intercept, the value when t = 0.
Setting t = 0: f(0) = 14(0) + 9 = 9. Since t = 0 is the moment of purchase, 9 is the length at that moment.

• A: "Tavon will keep the plant for 9 months" — 9 has units of inches (length), not months. Eliminated.
  • B: "grows 9 inches each month" — monthly growth is the slope, 14, not 9. Eliminated.
  • C: "maximum length of 9 inches" — a linear function increases without bound; there is no maximum. Eliminated.
  • D: "estimated length was 9 inches when Tavon purchased it" — this matches f(0) = 9. That matches choice D — D is correct.
